name: obsidian-block-reference-enhancer
description: Render and navigate UUID-based block references and block embeds in Live Preview and Reading Mode, with Logseq-style outlines, property hiding, source badges, backlinks, and local indexing.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test: node scripts/test-markdown-fence-compat.mjs && node scripts/test-index-cache-compat.mjs && node scripts/test-outline-paste-parser.mjs

author: msjsc001
